differences: Bottom tab structure, picker card density, search/result list layout, and pantry match rows now match the mobile prototype category.
Planned servings sheet remains slightly taller than the prototype by about 20-25px on 390px and about 20px on 320px.
Bottom-tab icon glyphs are service-local SVGs, so they are visually close but not pixel-identical to the prototype icons.
Food thumbnails use deterministic local SVG emoji assets for evidence, so raster antialiasing differs from the prototype reference.
suggestions: In a later precision pass, extract the Wave1 planned-servings sheet as a shared component and tune its fixed vertical rhythm.
If pixel parity is required for icons, consolidate the prototype tab SVG paths into the shared Wave1 mobile bottom tab component.
reasoning: The core mobile picker layouts now align with the fixed prototype references across 390px and 320px. Remaining differences are localized to icon glyphs, deterministic evidence thumbnails, and small bottom-sheet vertical rhythm.
